---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
pagetitle: "Curriculum Vitae | Mesfin Genie"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
description: "Curriculum vitae of Mesfin Genie, Senior Lecturer in Health Economics."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell cv-heading"><div><p class="eyebrow">Curriculum vitae</p><h1>Mesfin Genie</h1><p>Senior Lecturer in Health Economics · The University of Newcastle</p></div><div class="cv-actions"><a class="button-primary" href="/cv/mesfin-genie-cv.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Download PDF CV</a><a class="button-secondary" href="/cv/mesfin-genie-cv.tex" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LaTeX source</a></div></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow cv-page"><h2>Academic appointments</h2><div class="timeline"><article class="timeline-item"><h3>Senior Lecturer in Health Economics</h3><p><strong>The University of Newcastle, Australia · 2026–present</strong><br>Newcastle Business School.</p></article><article class="timeline-item"><h3>Lecturer in Health Economics</h3><p><strong>The University of Newcastle, Australia · 2023–2025</strong><br>Newcastle Business School.</p></article><article class="timeline-item"><h3>Health Measurement and Regulatory Science Fellow</h3><p><strong>Duke University, United States · 2023–2024</strong><br>Duke Department of Population Health Sciences; concurrent fellowship.</p></article><article class="timeline-item"><h3>Postdoctoral Research Fellow</h3><p><strong>Auburn University, United States · 2022–2023</strong><br>Harrison College of Pharmacy.</p></article><article class="timeline-item"><h3>Research Fellow</h3><p><strong>University of Aberdeen, United Kingdom · 2020–2022</strong><br>Health Economics Research Unit.</p></article><article class="timeline-item"><h3>Postdoctoral Research Fellow</h3><p><strong>Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, Italy · 2019–2020</strong><br>Department of Economics.</p></article></div><h2>Education</h2><ul class="cv-list"><li><strong>PhD in Economics</strong>, Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, Italy, 2019</li><li><strong>MSc in Health Economics and Management</strong>, University of Bologna, Italy, 2025</li><li><strong>MSc in Economics</strong>, Addis Ababa University, Ethiopia, 2010</li><li><strong>BA in Economics</strong>, Jimma University, Ethiopia, 2006</li></ul><h2>Selected funded programmes</h2><ul class="cv-list"><li><strong>MandEval</strong>, Medical Research Future Fund, MRF2019107, 2023–2026. Total programme value A$4,754,183.37; University of Newcastle component A$808,440. University of Newcastle lead and investigator.</li><li><strong>Scaling Field Epidemiology Training Programs in India</strong>, World Bank, 2025, A$416,000. Lead, University of Newcastle project team.</li></ul><h2>Research areas</h2><p>Health preferences and choice modelling; behavioural decision science; eye tracking and information processing; vaccination and public-health policy; economic evaluation.</p><h2>Teaching</h2><p>ECON2112 Health Economics and Finance; ECON3111 Behavioural Economics; ECON3011 Health Economics and Finance.</p><h2>Research tools</h2><p><a href="/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">eMANDEVAL Future</a> · <a href="/farming-bca-tool-v18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</a></p><h2>Profiles and contact</h2><div class="profile-links"><a href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au">Email</a><a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">University profile</a><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar</a><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ORCID</a><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mesfin-Genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ResearchGate</a><a href="https://au.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie-ph-d-65634216" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a><a href="https://github.com/DrGenie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a><a href="https://x.com/mesfin_genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">X</a></div></div></section>
```
